posts.author: colinknopper (Colin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I’m currently in the process of making a OGSM for my organization. Was looking for ideas / input how to incorporate this canvas layout in a Monday board. There are a lot of columns available that can be super useful but i’m looking for a good way to organize the board (or dashboard).

Looking forward to your ideas!

posts.author: ebrooks (Esti Brooks)
posts.cookedHtml: curious if you ever figured this one out since I’m encountering the same issue.
